title: Minecolonies TH Advancements
body:
# CAUTION
    This mod is NOT an OFFICIAL ADDON from the MineColonies Team.
    If you use this mod, you should CAN'T GET ANY SUPPORT from the MineColonies Team.
    Do not submit any issue to the MineColonies Team if this mod is installed.

# Features
   Adds Advancements for upgrading your Town Hall to Level 2, 3, and 4.
   Allows for easier use with FTB:Quests.

 
Upgrade to Town Hall 2: Advancement Name: Upgrades!
Upgrade to Town Hall 3: Advancement Name: The Nation expands!
Upgrade to Town Hall 4: Advancement Name: The City Rises!
